name: Stained Glass Window
description: A large decorative stained-glass window inside a wall section, typically 3x6x1 (tall and narrow). The skill frames the panel with @accent jambs on both sides, an @accent sill across the bottom and an @accent arch top — a flat lintel with @stairs at the inside top corners so the cap reads as an arch — then fills the interior with coloured stained-glass panes arranged in a per-style mosaic: rose-window stripes for medieval (red/blue/yellow), minimalist geometric checker for modern (white/light_blue), and a random mystic scatter for fantasy (purple/magenta/cyan). Defensive on AABBs from 2x3x1 arrow-slits up to 5x8x1 cathedral-tall panels.

required_furniture.rule: @accent vertical columns on the two outermost along-columns, spanning the full panel height.
@accent course across the bottom row, jamb to jamb, doubling as the structural sill.
@accent ridge across the top row; when width >= 3 two @stairs sit at the inside top corners facing inward, giving the lintel an arched silhouette.
Multiple colours of stained_glass_pane filling the interior cells. Palette and pattern depend on style — at least 2 colours, often 3, arranged as columns / stripes / scatter.

placement_rules: Tall narrow proportions (height > width) — the preferred panel is 3 wide by 6 tall.
Colored panes form a mosaic pattern: solid colour-columns (medieval), parity checker (modern), or seeded random scatter (fantasy).
Frame in @accent for contrast against the host wall — jambs, sill, and arch ridge all use the accent slot.
One cell thick along the wall normal — the skill auto-detects whether the panel runs along x or along z from the input shape.
Defensive on AABBs from 2x3x1 up to 5x8x1; out-of-range inputs are clamped, never raised. Width < 3 omits the corner arch stairs but still places the flat lintel.
lighting_ventilation: Stained glass is transparent to light in Minecraft — sunlight passes through coloured panes and tints the interior, supporting the 'Pools of Light' pattern. The window does not block sky access for grass/plant blocks below, and panes connect to adjacent solid blocks giving a clean leaded-glass silhouette.

medieval.notes: Rose-window vibe: alternating columns of red / blue / yellow stained_glass_pane between stone-brick jambs. Fits chapels, cathedrals, great halls.

modern.notes: Minimalist geometric checker of white_stained_glass_pane + light_blue_stained_glass_pane between smooth-stone jambs. Suits civic buildings and modernist chapels.

fantasy.notes: Mystic scatter of purple / magenta / cyan stained_glass_pane against purpur jambs. Fits wizard towers, fey courts and shrines.
